headline: Organon Wins FDA Nod to Expand TOFIDENCE Use in Severe CRS & COVID-19
summary: OGN's TOFIDENCE gains FDA approval for life-threatening CRS and certain hospitalized COVID-19 patients, broadening its critical-care role.
